name: West Coast Crab Louis Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine mayonnaise, chili sauce, chopped green bell peppers, sweet pickle pieces, onion, and lemon juice in a bowl. Blend well.
2. Add the crabmeat to the mixture and toss lightly until combined.
3. Chill the salad thoroughly in the refrigerator.
4. At serving time, spoon the salad onto lettuce leaves.
5. Garnish with quartered tomatoes, green pepper slices, diced hard-cooked eggs, and pimiento strips.
6. Serve chilled for 4-6 people.
From the cookbook: "The west coast has received credit for developing this wonderful recipe. Regardless of the type of crab meat you use, Dungeness or blue, it's always a delight."
